subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God! Thou seest and beholdest the dust that hath risen to the zenith of heaven, and the smoke that hath enveloped humanity, and the mist [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی تنظر و تری النقع المثار الی عنان السماء والدخان الذی غشی الوری و الضباب
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for forgiveness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
